prose:
**Phenol fukui analysis (reactivity indices)** — DFT calculation using the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis in PySCF (density fitting enabled), **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The parent molecule coordinates were read from: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. The most electrophilic atom was determined to be C at atom index 2 (third atom in the system) with Fukui plus index `f+ = 2.10283`, and the most nucleophilic atom is O at atom index 0 (first atom in the system) with Fukui minus index `f- = 0.16201`.

Warnings: 1. **sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)** 2. **sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)** 3. **common header present**  
Command used: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --solvent none --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmphsa6h4wd/live.json`. Plot available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gpt-4o/20260704-183626_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
